summary_en: 450,000 shares (5.49% of outstanding shares excluding treasury), up to ¥380M budget, execution via open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange (agency method), May 22, 2026–Mar 31, 2027.
title_en: Notice regarding decision on matters pertaining to acquisition of treasury shares (acquisition of treasury shares based on Articles of Incorporation provisions under Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: Dynic Corporation announced on May 15, 2026 that its board of directors resolved to acquire treasury shares under the authority granted by the Articles of Incorporation and Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2. The program targets acquisition of up to 450,000 shares (5.49% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total expenditure of ¥380 million. Execution will occur via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange using an agency brokerage method over the period May 22, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency, enable flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions, enhance per-share shareholder value, and increase returns to shareholders. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 308,245 treasury shares against 8,196,502 issued shares (excluding treasury stock).
